scripts.build: bun run build:web && bun run build:sync
scripts.cf-typegen: bun run --cwd apps/web cf-typegen && bun run --cwd apps/sync cf-typegen
scripts.db:migrate:local: wrangler d1 migrations apply vista-dev --local --config apps/web/wrangler.jsonc
scripts.db:seed:local: wrangler d1 execute vista-dev --local --config apps/web/wrangler.jsonc --file packages/db/seeds/dev.sql
scripts.precommit: bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun run test
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd packages/db typecheck && bun run --cwd apps/sync typecheck && bun run --cwd apps/web typecheck
